We hope you'll join the thousands of other satisfied customers that buy and service their vehicles the Napleton way. This 2025 Ford Transit Cargo Van T-250 148 LOW RF 9070 GV offered in OXFORD WHITE will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Reverse Sensing System ($295 value)

    3.73 Limited Slip Axle Ratio ($325 value)

    • Includes limited slip rear axle with 3.73 ratio.

    Vinyl Floor Covering ($245 value)

    • Includes front and rear vinyl floor covering.

    Load Area Protection ($485 value)

    • Includes rear polypropylene panels on side walls and doors.

    2 Additional Keys ($75 value)

    • Includes 2 additional keys, for a total of 4, with FOBs.

    Power Glass/Manual Folding Long-Arm Mirrors w/Heat ($220 value)

      Dark Palazzo Gray Cloth Upholstery ($115 value)

      • Includes 2-way manual adjustable driver and passenger seats.

      SYNC 3 with 4 In. Multi-Functional Display ($280 value)

      • Includes SYNC 3 entertainment system, AM/FM stereo, 4.0 in. display, Bluetooth, and dual USB ports.

      Dual Absorbed Glass Mat Battery ($295 value)

        110V/400W Front Power Outlet ($475 value)

          Cargo Tie-Down Hooks ($25 value)

            Chrome HID Headlamps ($455 value)

            • Includes HID headlamps with chrome bezel and LED signature surround.

            Safety and Security

            • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
            • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.
            • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.
            • Brake assist - Stop right there. Something jumps out into the middle of the road and you need to stop now! With brake assist, you will. It uses the speed of the brake pedal's travel to sense panic braking, then applies all available power to boost your stopping power. Brake assist can stop the accident before it is one.

            Technology and Telematics

            • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.

entry.ns0:description:
The Napleton Auto Group promotes a no pressure buying experience that puts the customer in charge of the buying process, and for over 80 years, the Napleton family has made sure that absolutely nothing is more important than our commitment to your satisfaction. Our staff members are professional in every sense of the word, and receive regular training, including factory certification, so they are truly knowledgeable about the vehicles we offer. We want every customer's experience to be as timely, comfortable and ultimately as satisfying as it possibly can be. You'll see it in every department of every Napleton Auto Group dealership. We hope you'll join the thousands of other satisfied customers that buy and service their vehicles the Napleton way. This 2025 Ford E-Series Cutaway E-350 DRW 138 WB offered in OXFORD WHITE will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Exterior and Appearance

  • Steel wheels are economical and provide proven durability.

In-car Entertainment

  • Wireless audio streaming - Strike the cord. With wireless streaming, the endless library of music on your mobile device is available through your vehicle's sound system! Make a playlist befitting of your road trip as it rolls along; let the back seat passengers control the selection; catch up on your favorite podcasts. With wireless audio streaming, all you have to do is press play.

Powertrain and Mechanical

  • Variable valve timing - Change your output. There are a lot of variables in your drive, so why should your engine always operate the same? With variable valve timing, the engine is efficient at both low and high RPM's, so you get better fuel efficiency, cleaner emissions and improved performance. Variable valve timing provides a better drive, every time.

Safety and Security

  • Tracker system - Lost and found. This built-in tracker system can pinpoint your vehicle's location giving you the peace of mind that your vehicle is where it's supposed to be, or if it isn't. This system is useful for keeping an eye on teen drivers, fleet vehicles, or finding your vehicle if it has been stolen. Know exactly where your vehicle is at all times when you have this tracker system.

Technology and Telematics

  • Selective Internet access - a more focused delivery. Selective internet access allows you to tailor the features for your feed, such as sports scores, local news, or current weather. When it comes to getting what you want, selective internet access is a net gain.

entry.title: 2026 Ford Maverick XL
entry.ns0:description:
The Napleton Auto Group promotes a no pressure buying experience that puts the customer in charge of the buying process, and for over 80 years, the Napleton family has made sure that absolutely nothing is more important than our commitment to your satisfaction. Our staff members are professional in every sense of the word, and receive regular training, including factory certification, so they are truly knowledgeable about the vehicles we offer. We want every customer's experience to be as timely, comfortable and ultimately as satisfying as it possibly can be. You'll see it in every department of every Napleton Auto Group dealership. We hope you'll join the thousands of other satisfied customers that buy and service their vehicles the Napleton way. This 2026 Ford Maverick XL offered in Shadow Black will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Safety and Security

  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
  • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.
  • Lane departure prevention - Keep it between the lines. It only takes a moment of inattention for your vehicle to drift. With lane departure prevention, your vehicle takes corrective action to help you avoid unintentionally moving out of your lane. Lane departure prevention is an extra level of safety for you and those around you.

Technology and Telematics

  • Smart device mirroring - Smartphone, meet smart car. You can control your device through your vehicle's infotainment system. Smart device mirroring brings together safety and convenience by making it easier to find what you're looking for while keeping your eyes on the road.
  • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.
Other notable features: ENGINE: 2.0L ECOBOOST, SHADOW BLACK Napleton Columbus Ford is proud to serve customers in communities that include Milwaukee, Madison, Green Bay, Kenosha, Racine, Appleton, Waukesha, Oshkosh, Eau Claire, Janesville, West Allis, La Crosse, Sheboygan, Wauwatosa, Fond du Lac, New Berlin, Brookfield, Wausau, Beloit, Greenfield, Manitowoc, Franklin, Oak Creek, West Bend, Sun Prairie, Superior, Stevens Point, Neenah, De Pere, Mequon and Chicagoland area.       • Includes front and rear vinyl floor covering.

      Load Area Protection ($485 value)

      • Includes rear polypropylene panels on side walls and doors.

      2 Additional Keys ($75 value)

      • Includes 2 additional keys, for a total of 4, with FOBs.

      Power Glass/Manual Folding Long-Arm Mirrors w/Heat ($220 value)

        Heavy Duty Trailer Tow Package ($485 value)

        • Includes frame mounted hitch receiver, 4-pin and 7-pin connector wiring, tow/haul mode, and relay system for backup/B+/running lights.

        Large Center Console ($195 value)

        • Includes large center console with integrated shifter.

        Dark Palazzo Gray Cloth Upholstery ($115 value)

        • Includes 2-way manual adjustable driver and passenger seats.

        Cargo Tie-Down Hooks ($25 value)

          Full Rear Compartment LED Lighting ($75 value)

            Fixed Rear Door Glass ($250 value)

            • Includes fixed glass for rear cargo doors and rear window defroster.

            SYNC 4 ($930 value)

            • Includes SYNC 4 with enhanced conversational voice recognition, 12 in. LCD capacitive touchscreen, connected navigation, Bluetooth, dual USB ports, and automatic temperature control.

            Intelligent Access with Push-Button Start ($370 value)

              Chrome HID Headlamps ($455 value)

              • Includes HID headlamps with chrome bezel and LED signature surround.

              Lane Keeping System with Blind Spot Information System ($795 value)

              • Includes lane keeping system (provides a visual warning and resistive steering torque to prevent a collision should an object be recognized in the vehicles blind spot while changing lanes), blind spot information system with cross traffic alert, and trailer coverage.

              Convenience

              • Cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed using the steering wheel mounted controls and it will maintain that speed without driver intervention. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Resting your right foot is right at your fingertips thanks to cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls.

              Safety and Security

              • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
              • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.
              • Brake assist - Stop right there. Something jumps out into the middle of the road and you need to stop now! With brake assist, you will. It uses the speed of the brake pedal's travel to sense panic braking, then applies all available power to boost your stopping power. Brake assist can stop the accident before it is one.

              Technology and Telematics

              • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.

Our staff members are professional in every sense of the word, and receive regular training, including factory certification, so they are truly knowledgeable about the vehicles we offer. We want every customer's experience to be as timely, comfortable and ultimately as satisfying as it possibly can be. You'll see it in every department of every Napleton Auto Group dealership. We hope you'll join the thousands of other satisfied customers that buy and service their vehicles the Napleton way. This 2026 Ford Transit Cargo Van T-250 148 MED RF 9150 GV offered in Oxford White will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Order Code 101A

  • 10-Speed Automatic Transmission with OD and SelectShift
  • 16" Silver Steel Wheels with Silver Hubcaps
  • 9,150 lbs GVWR
  • AM/FM Stereo
  • 235/65R16C 121/119 R AS BSW Tires

Heavy-Duty Trailer Tow Package ($485 value)

  • Frame Mounted Hitch Receiver
  • Tow/Haul Mode with Trailering Wiring Provisions

Safety and Security

  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
  • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.
  • Lane departure prevention - Keep it between the lines. It only takes a moment of inattention for your vehicle to drift. With lane departure prevention, your vehicle takes corrective action to help you avoid unintentionally moving out of your lane. Lane departure prevention is an extra level of safety for you and those around you.

Technology and Telematics

  • Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring
  • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.
Other notable features: ENGINE: 3.5L ECOBOOST V6, OXFORD WHITE Napleton Columbus Ford is proud to serve customers in communities that include Milwaukee, Madison, Green Bay, Kenosha, Racine, Appleton, Waukesha, Oshkosh, Eau Claire, Janesville, West Allis, La Crosse, Sheboygan, Wauwatosa, Fond du Lac, New Berlin, Brookfield, Wausau, Beloit, Greenfield, Manitowoc, Franklin, Oak Creek, West Bend, Sun Prairie, Superior, Stevens Point, Neenah, De Pere, Mequon and Chicagoland area. Give us a call at 920-212-8279 or stop by to test drive or inquire about your new car or truck today! 330 Transit Road Columbus WI 53925 Napleton Autos Online Pricing Disclaimer New vehicle inventory is offered for sale at the Manufacturer's Suggested Retail Price (MSRP), as set by Ford Motor Company and/or Ford Credit. Prices labeled as the "Napleton Price" include all eligible dealer discounts and/or manufacturer incentives and do not include taxes, title, license fees, documentation fees, optional equipment, or dealer-installed accessories selected by the customer at the time of purchase. Destination charges may vary by model and are included in the displayed pricing. All pricing is subject to change without notice based on manufacturer program updates, incentive eligibility, or market conditions. Napleton Autos advertises its inventory on this website, www.napleton.autos, as well as on third-party advertising platforms. Pricing is specific to each vehicle, identified by its Vehicle Identification Number (VIN) and dealer stock number. The pricing shown on www.napleton.autos represents the most current and accurate pricing for Napleton Autos. In the event of any discrepancy between this website and any third-party website, the pricing displayed on www.napleton.autos will be considered the most accurate and will supersede all other advertised prices. This 2016 Ford F-150 Lariat offered in White Platinum Metallic Tri-Coat will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Reverse Sensing System ($275 value)

    Engine Block Heater ($90 value)

      Trailer Brake Controller ($275 value)

        3.55 Electronic Locking Axle Ratio ($470 value)

          White Platinum Metallic Tri-Coat Paint ($595 value)

            LED Puddle/Side Mirror Spotlights ($175 value)

            • Includes LED side mirror spotlights and high intensity LED security approach lamps.

            110V/400W Outlet ($200 value)

            • Includes one 110V/400W outlet in the instrument panel, and second outlet in the console with bucket seats.

            Extended Range 36 Gallon Fuel Tank ($395 value)

              20 x 8.5 In. Chrome PVD Wheels ($995 value)

                Navigation ($795 value)

                • Includes voice-activated navigation with SiriusXM Traffic and Travel Link, with five years of service in the 48 contiguous United States and D.C.

                Equipment Group 501A ($1,500 value)

                • Includes vehicle with standard equipment, BLIS (Blind Spot Information System) with Cross-Traffic Alert (BLIS sensor in taillamp), remote start system, remote tailgate release, reverse sensing system, LED side mirror spotlights, power folding, power glass side view mirrors with heat, turn signals, memory, auto-dimming feature on drivers side, high-intensity LED security approach lamps, body-color skull caps, one 110V/400W outlet (two with bucket seats), and universal garage door opener.

                Equipment Group 502A ($7,795 value)

                • Includes vehicle with standard equipment, BLIS (Blind Spot Information System) with Cross-Traffic Alert (BLIS sensor in taillamp), remote start system, remote tailgate release, reverse sensing system, quad beam LED headlamps and LED taillamps, automatic high beam lights with rain-sensing windshield wipers, LED side mirror spotlights, power folding, power glass side view mirrors with heat, turn signals, memory, auto-dimming feature on drivers side, high-intensity LED security approach lamps, and chrome skull caps, one 110V/400W outlet (two with bucket seats), universal garage door opener, power tilt and telescoping steering column with memory, heated steering wheel, heated and cooled leather-trimmed bucket seats, 10-way power driver and passenger seats, memory driver seat, heated second row seats, flow-through console with floor shift, Sony single-CD player, HD radio, SiriusXM Satellite Radio, voice-activated navigation with SiriusXM Traffic and Travel Link with five years of service in the 48 contiguous United States and D.C., and Lariat Chrome Appearance Package including 18 inch chrome-like PVD wheels, 275/65R18 OWL all-terrain tires, chrome angular step bars, chrome door handles with body-color bezel, two chrome front tow hooks, chrome single-tip exhaust, chrome skull caps on exterior mirrors, and chrome three-bar style grille with chrome surround and chrome mesh insert. When Two-Tone Paint is selected, front and rear chrome bumpers are replaced with front and rear accent-color bumpers, and standard body-color wheel lip moldings are replaced with accent-color wheel lip moldings.

                Lariat Chrome Appearance Package ($1,695 value)

                • Includes 18 inch chrome-like PVD wheels, 275/65R18 OWL all-terrain tires, chrome angular step bars, chrome door and tailgate handles with body-color bezel, two chrome front tow hooks, chrome single-tip exhaust, chrome skull caps on exterior mirrors, and chrome three-bar style grille with chrome surround and chrome mesh insert. When Two-Tone Paint is selected, front and rear chrome bumpers are replaced with front and rear accent-color bumpers, and standard body-color wheel lip moldings are replaced with accent-color wheel lip moldings.

                Power Deployable Running Boards ($995 value)

                  Sony Audio w/Single CD and HD Radio ($525 value)

                  • Includes Sony single-CD player, HD radio, SiriusXM Satellite Radio, 10 speakers, and subwoofer.

                  Leather Captains Seats w/Console and Floor Shifter ($650 value)

                  • Includes heated and cooled leather-trimmed 10-way power driver and passenger bucket seats, four-way adjustable driver and passenger headrests, memory driver seat, flow-through full console, and floor shifter.

                  Ruby Red Metallic Tinted Clearcoat Paint ($395 value)

                  • Includes tinted clearcoat paint.

                  Pro Trailer Backup Assist ($395 value)

                  • Includes Pro Trailer Backup Assist and tailgate LED.

                  Comfort

                  • Ventilated front seats -That's cool. Ventilated front seats provides targeted cool air so you and your passenger can get comfortable quicker in hot weather. Getting comfortable is no sweat when you have ventilated front seats.

                  Convenience

                  • Cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed using the steering wheel mounted controls and it will maintain that speed without driver intervention. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Resting your right foot is right at your fingertips thanks to cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls.

                  Safety and Security

                  • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.
                  • Brake assist - Stop right there. Something jumps out into the middle of the road and you need to stop now! With brake assist, you will. It uses the speed of the brake pedal's travel to sense panic braking, then applies all available power to boost your stopping power. Brake assist can stop the accident before it is one.

                  Technology and Telematics

                  • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.
                  Other notable features: ENGINE: 3.5L V6 ECOBOOST, WHITE PLATINUM METALLIC TRI-COAT Napleton Columbus Ford is proud to serve customers in communities that include Milwaukee, Madison, Green Bay, Kenosha, Racine, Appleton, Waukesha, Oshkosh, Eau Claire, Janesville, West Allis, La Crosse, Sheboygan, Wauwatosa, Fond du Lac, New Berlin, Brookfield, Wausau, Beloit, Greenfield, Manitowoc, Franklin, Oak Creek, West Bend, Sun Prairie, Superior, Stevens Point, Neenah, De Pere, Mequon and Chicagoland area. entry.title: 2025 Ford Escape PHEV
entry.ns0:description:
The Napleton Auto Group promotes a no pressure buying experience that puts the customer in charge of the buying process, and for over 80 years, the Napleton family has made sure that absolutely nothing is more important than our commitment to your satisfaction. Our staff members are professional in every sense of the word, and receive regular training, including factory certification, so they are truly knowledgeable about the vehicles we offer. We want every customer's experience to be as timely, comfortable and ultimately as satisfying as it possibly can be. You'll see it in every department of every Napleton Auto Group dealership. We hope you'll join the thousands of other satisfied customers that buy and service their vehicles the Napleton way. This 2025 Ford Escape PHEV offered in Star White Metallic Tri-Coat will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Star White Metallic Tri-Coat Paint ($995 value)

    Front and Rear Floor Liners (without Carpet Mats) ($160 value)

      Convenience

      • GPS linked cruise control - Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until GPS linked cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed and the system uses GPS navigation data to maintain that speed without driver intervention - including slowing down for curves and anticipating hills. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Meet your ultimate co-pilot; GPS linked cruise control.

      Safety and Security

      • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
      • Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. Our staff members are professional in every sense of the word, and receive regular training, including factory certification, so they are truly knowledgeable about the vehicles we offer. We want every customer's experience to be as timely, comfortable and ultimately as satisfying as it possibly can be. You'll see it in every department of every Napleton Auto Group dealership. We hope you'll join the thousands of other satisfied customers that buy and service their vehicles the Napleton way. This 2025 Ford F-150 XLT offered in OXFORD WHITE will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Full Coverage Rubber Floor Mats ($200 value)

    Manual Telescoping/Power Glass/Manual Folding Trailer Tow Mirrors ($275 value)

    • Includes manual telescoping and manual-folding power heated side view mirrors with black mirror caps and integrated turn signals, and black mirror caps.

    Bed Utility Package ($860 value)

    • Includes LED box lighting w/ zone lighting, four BoxLink premium locking cleats, tailgate step, and tailgate work surface.

    Tow/Haul Package ($1,010 value)

    • Includes integrated trailer brake controller, electronic locking rear differential, and upgraded rear bumper.

    3.55 Electronic Locking Axle Ratio (Tow/Haul Upgrade) ($395 value)

      Equipment Group 303A ($11,915 value)

      • Includes vehicle with standard equipment, 20 x 8.5 inch chrome PVD wheels with 275/60R20 all-terrain tires, 6 inch chrome angular running boards, chrome door handles, black mesh grille with chrome center bar, chrome exhaust tip, manual-folding power heated side view mirrors with chrome mirror caps and integrated turn signals, auto-dimming rearview mirror, Intelligent Access with push button start, remote engine start, remote tailgate release, dual-zone electronic automatic temperature control, cloth 40/console/40 front seat and flow-through console with steering column-mounted shift, 10-way power adjustable driver seat with power lumbar, 8-way power adjustable passenger seat with power lumbar, heated front seats, power adjustable pedals with memory, interior work surface, 110V/400W outlet in the instrument panel and pickup bed, partitioned lockable fold-flat storage, power-sliding rear window, B&O 640-watt sound system with 8 speakers and subwoofer, connected navigation (1-year trial), 360 degree camera, front parking sensors, adaptive cruise control with stop-and-go, lane centering, automatic emergency braking with oncoming traffic detection, evasive steering assist, driver state detection, Pro Trailer Backup Assist, and Pro Trailer Hitch Assist.

      Convenience

      • GPS linked cruise control - Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until GPS linked cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed and the system uses GPS navigation data to maintain that speed without driver intervention - including slowing down for curves and anticipating hills. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Meet your ultimate co-pilot; GPS linked cruise control.
      • Unresponsive driver assistant - a reaction to inaction. Maybe you fell asleep. Maybe you lost consciousness. No matter how it happens, Unresponsive driver assistant works to help lessen the danger when it does. It detects prolonged driver unresponsiveness, automatically bringing the vehicle to a stop and turning on the hazard lights. If equipped, emergency services will also be contacted. Unresponsive driver assistant is safety that never sleeps.

      Safety and Security

      • Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-on cruise control.
      • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.

      Technology and Telematics

      • SYNC 4 AppLink/Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring

This 2026 Ford Escape ST-Line offered in Vapor Blue Metallic will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Panoramic Vista Roof ($1,595 value)

  • Includes power panoramic Vista roof with power shade and black roof-rack side rails.

17 In. Mini Spare Wheel with Spare Tire ($345 value)

    Cold Weather Package ($995 value)

    • Includes heated front seats, heated sideview mirrors, remote start system, and heated steering wheel.

    Vapor Blue Metallic Paint ($495 value)

      Tech Pack #1 ($995 value)

      • Includes Ford Co-Pilot360 Assist+ with adaptive cruise control with stop and go, lane centering, predictive speed assist, Connected Navigation with 1 year of connectivity, pinch-to-zoom capability, live traffic, predictive destinations, route guidance, evasive steering assist, intersection assist, rear parking sensor, rear view camera, SYNC 4 with enhanced voice recognition, and 13.2" LCD capacitive touchscreen with swipe capability.

      Power Liftgate ($495 value)

        Convenience

        • GPS linked cruise control - Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until GPS linked cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed and the system uses GPS navigation data to maintain that speed without driver intervention - including slowing down for curves and anticipating hills. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Meet your ultimate co-pilot; GPS linked cruise control.

        Safety and Security

        • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
        • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
        • Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-on cruise control.

        Technology and Telematics

        • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.
        Other notable features: 1.5L ECOBOOST ENGINE W/AUTO START-STOP TECHNOLOGY, VAPOR BLUE METALLIC, EBONY, PARTIAL VINYL/CLOTH FRONT SPORT CONTOUR BUCKET SEATS W/RED STITCHING Napleton Columbus Ford is proud to serve customers in communities that include Milwaukee, Madison, Green Bay, Kenosha, Racine, Appleton, Waukesha, Oshkosh, Eau Claire, Janesville, West Allis, La Crosse, Sheboygan, Wauwatosa, Fond du Lac, New Berlin, Brookfield, Wausau, Beloit, Greenfield, Manitowoc, Franklin, Oak Creek, West Bend, Sun Prairie, Superior, Stevens Point, Neenah, De Pere, Mequon and Chicagoland area. Our staff members are professional in every sense of the word, and receive regular training, including factory certification, so they are truly knowledgeable about the vehicles we offer. We want every customer's experience to be as timely, comfortable and ultimately as satisfying as it possibly can be. You'll see it in every department of every Napleton Auto Group dealership. We hope you'll join the thousands of other satisfied customers that buy and service their vehicles the Napleton way. This 2026 Ford Explorer ST-Line offered in Rapid Red Metallic Tinted Clearcoat will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Rapid Red Metallic Tinted Clearcoat Paint ($495 value)

    ST-Line Street Pack ($1,450 value)

    • Includes 21 in. Magnetite painted aluminum wheels, performance brakes, and red painted front and rear performance brake calipers.

    18 In. Spare Wheel ($400 value)

      Panoramic Fixed Glass Roof with Power Shade ($1,695 value)

        Premium Package ($1,360 value)

        • Includes 110V/150W AC power outlet in rear center console, ambient lighting, auto-dimming interior rearview mirror, power heated sideview mirrors, LED turn signal indicators, security approach lamps, drivers side auto-dimming, driver/passenger side memory, rain-sensing wipers (front only), drivers seat memory, and second row heated seats.

        Convenience

        • GPS linked cruise control - Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until GPS linked cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed and the system uses GPS navigation data to maintain that speed without driver intervention - including slowing down for curves and anticipating hills. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Meet your ultimate co-pilot; GPS linked cruise control.

        Safety and Security

        • Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-on cruise control.
        • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.

        Technology and Telematics

        • Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring
        • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.
        Other notable features: Napleton Columbus Ford is proud to serve customers in communities that include Milwaukee, Madison, Green Bay, Kenosha, Racine, Appleton, Waukesha, Oshkosh, Eau Claire, Janesville, West Allis, La Crosse, Sheboygan, Wauwatosa, Fond du Lac, New Berlin, Brookfield, Wausau, Beloit, Greenfield, Manitowoc, Franklin, Oak Creek, West Bend, Sun Prairie, Superior, Stevens Point, Neenah, De Pere, Mequon and Chicagoland area. Give us a call at 920-212-8279 or stop by to test drive or inquire about your new car or truck today! 330 Transit Road Columbus WI 53925 Napleton Autos Online Pricing Disclaimer New vehicle inventory is offered for sale at the Manufacturer's Suggested Retail Price (MSRP), as set by Ford Motor Company and/or Ford Credit. Prices labeled as the "Napleton Price" include all eligible dealer discounts and/or manufacturer incentives and do not include taxes, title, license fees, documentation fees, optional equipment, or dealer-installed accessories selected by the customer at the time of purchase. Destination charges may vary by model and are included in the displayed pricing. All pricing is subject to change without notice based on manufacturer program updates, incentive eligibility, or market conditions. Napleton Autos advertises its inventory on this website, www.napleton.autos, as well as on third-party advertising platforms. Pricing is specific to each vehicle, identified by its Vehicle Identification Number (VIN) and dealer stock number. The pricing shown on www.napleton.autos represents the most current and accurate pricing for Napleton Autos. In the event of any discrepancy between this website and any third-party website, the pricing displayed on www.napleton.autos will be considered the most accurate and will supersede all other advertised prices. While every effort is made to ensure the accuracy of the information on this site, errors may occur. Please verify all information with a Napleton Autos Client Advisor. You may do so by contacting us directly or visiting the dealership.

entry.ns0:description:
The Napleton Auto Group promotes a no pressure buying experience that puts the customer in charge of the buying process, and for over 80 years, the Napleton family has made sure that absolutely nothing is more important than our commitment to your satisfaction. Our staff members are professional in every sense of the word, and receive regular training, including factory certification, so they are truly knowledgeable about the vehicles we offer. We want every customer's experience to be as timely, comfortable and ultimately as satisfying as it possibly can be. You'll see it in every department of every Napleton Auto Group dealership. We hope you'll join the thousands of other satisfied customers that buy and service their vehicles the Napleton way. This 2025 Ford Bronco Big Bend offered in Carbonized Gray Metallic will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Equipment Group 222A Mid Package ($1,540 value)

    Ford Co-Pilot360

    • Auto High-Beam Headlamps
    • Blind Spot Information System (BLIS)
    • Lane-Keeping System
    • Pre-Collision Assist with Automatic Emergency Braking
    • Rear View Camera

    Safety and Security

    • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
    • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
    • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.

    Technology and Telematics

    • SYNC 4 AppLink/Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring
    • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.
    Other notable features: Napleton Columbus Ford is proud to serve customers in communities that include Milwaukee, Madison, Green Bay, Kenosha, Racine, Appleton, Waukesha, Oshkosh, Eau Claire, Janesville, West Allis, La Crosse, Sheboygan, Wauwatosa, Fond du Lac, New Berlin, Brookfield, Wausau, Beloit, Greenfield, Manitowoc, Franklin, Oak Creek, West Bend, Sun Prairie, Superior, Stevens Point, Neenah, De Pere, Mequon and Chicagoland area. Destination charges may vary by model and are included in the displayed pricing. This 2025 Ford Bronco Sport Outer Banks offered in Ruby Red Metallic Tinted Clearcoat will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Ruby Red Metallic Tinted Clearcoat Paint ($495 value)

    Power Moonroof ($995 value)

      Outer Banks Tech Package+ ($2,195 value)

      • Includes Ford Co-Pilot360 Assist 2.0, 360-degree camera (with trail and split view), front parking sensors, reverse brake assist, B&O sound system by Bang & Olufsen with 10-speakers and subwoofer, Connected Navigation with 1-year subscription included, pinch-to-zoom capability, live traffic, predictive destinations and route guidance, one box search, HD radio.

      Safety and Security

      • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
      • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
      • Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-on cruise control.
      • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.

      Technology and Telematics

      • SYNC 4 AppLink/Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring

This 2026 Ford Bronco Sport Big Bend offered in Space White Metallic will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Power Moonroof ($995 value)

    Convenience Package ($1,895 value)

    • Includes LED fog lamps, 8-way power driver's seat (fore/aft, up/down, recline, lumbar), front driver/passenger seat back map pockets, heated front row seats, premium wrapped steering wheel, and adjustable liftgate flood lights.

    Safety and Security

    • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
    • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
    • Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-on cruise control.

    Technology and Telematics

    • Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring
    • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.

      Safety and Security

      • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
      • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
      • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.

      • SYNC 4 AppLink/Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring

Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
  • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.
  • Lane departure prevention - Keep it between the lines. It only takes a moment of inattention for your vehicle to drift. With lane departure prevention, your vehicle takes corrective action to help you avoid unintentionally moving out of your lane. Lane departure prevention is an extra level of safety for you and those around you.

Technology and Telematics

  • Smart device mirroring - Smartphone, meet smart car. You can control your device through your vehicle's infotainment system. Smart device mirroring brings together safety and convenience by making it easier to find what you're looking for while keeping your eyes on the road.
  • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.
Other notable features: ENGINE: 2.0L ECOBOOST, VELOCITY BLUE, NAVY PIER/ASPEN GRAY, UNIQUE CLOTH FRONT BUCKET SEATS Napleton Columbus Ford is proud to serve customers in communities that include Milwaukee, Madison, Green Bay, Kenosha, Racine, Appleton, Waukesha, Oshkosh, Eau Claire, Janesville, West Allis, La Crosse, Sheboygan, Wauwatosa, Fond du Lac, New Berlin, Brookfield, Wausau, Beloit, Greenfield, Manitowoc, Franklin, Oak Creek, West Bend, Sun Prairie, Superior, Stevens Point, Neenah, De Pere, Mequon and Chicagoland area. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
    • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.

    Technology and Telematics

    • SYNC 4 AppLink/Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring
    • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.
    Other notable features: ENGINE: 3.5L V6 ECOBOOST HIGH OUTPUT, OXFORD WHITE Napleton Columbus Ford is proud to serve customers in communities that include Milwaukee, Madison, Green Bay, Kenosha, Racine, Appleton, Waukesha, Oshkosh, Eau Claire, Janesville, West Allis, La Crosse, Sheboygan, Wauwatosa, Fond du Lac, New Berlin, Brookfield, Wausau, Beloit, Greenfield, Manitowoc, Franklin, Oak Creek, West Bend, Sun Prairie, Superior, Stevens Point, Neenah, De Pere, Mequon and Chicagoland area. This 2026 Ford Explorer ST offered in Vapor Blue Metallic will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Convenience

  • GPS linked cruise control - Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until GPS linked cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed and the system uses GPS navigation data to maintain that speed without driver intervention - including slowing down for curves and anticipating hills. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Meet your ultimate co-pilot; GPS linked cruise control.
  • Unresponsive driver assistant - a reaction to inaction. Maybe you fell asleep. Maybe you lost consciousness. No matter how it happens, Unresponsive driver assistant works to help lessen the danger when it does. It detects prolonged driver unresponsiveness, automatically bringing the vehicle to a stop and turning on the hazard lights. If equipped, emergency services will also be contacted. Unresponsive driver assistant is safety that never sleeps.

Safety and Security

  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.

  • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.

This 2023 Hyundai Tucson SEL offered in Portofino Gray will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Option Group 01

    Cargo Net ($55 value)

      Wheel Locks ($65 value)

        Carpeted Floor Mats ($195 value)

          Roof Rack Cross Rails ($315 value)

            Cargo Tray ($115 value)

              Mudguards ($120 value)

              • Includes front and rear mudguards.

              First Aid Kit ($30 value)

                Rear Bumper Applique ($75 value)

                  Cargo Cover ($190 value)

                    All Season Fitted Liners ($245 value)

                      Serenity White Pearl Paint ($400 value)

                        Convenience

                        • Distance pacing cruise control with traffic stop-go. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with Distance pacing cruise control with traffic stop-go, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and the vehicle ahead. It's stop/go feature automatically brings the vehicle to a stop if traffic stops and resumes distance pacing cruise when traffic starts to move again. Distance pacing cruise control with traffic stop-go; your ultimate co-pilot.

                        Safety and Security

                        • Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-on cruise control.
                        • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
                        • Brake assist - Stop right there. Something jumps out into the middle of the road and you need to stop now! With brake assist, you will. It uses the speed of the brake pedal's travel to sense panic braking, then applies all available power to boost your stopping power. Brake assist can stop the accident before it is one.

                        Technology and Telematics

                        • Apple CarPlay & Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring
                        Other notable features: OPTION GROUP 01, BLACK, STAIN & ODOR RESISTANT CLOTH SEAT TRIM, REAR BUMPER APPLIQUE, FRONT AND REAR MUDGUARDS, CARPETED FLOOR MATS, CARGO NET, FIRST AID KIT Napleton Columbus Ford is proud to serve customers in communities that include Milwaukee, Madison, Green Bay, Kenosha, Racine, Appleton, Waukesha, Oshkosh, Eau Claire, Janesville, West Allis, La Crosse, Sheboygan, Wauwatosa, Fond du Lac, New Berlin, Brookfield, Wausau, Beloit, Greenfield, Manitowoc, Franklin, Oak Creek, West Bend, Sun Prairie, Superior, Stevens Point, Neenah, De Pere, Mequon and Chicagoland area. The Napleton Auto Group promotes a no pressure buying experience that puts the customer in charge of the buying process, and for over 80 years, the Napleton family has made sure that absolutely nothing is more important than our commitment to your satisfaction. Our staff members are professional in every sense of the word, and receive regular training, including factory certification, so they are truly knowledgeable about the vehicles we offer. We hope you'll join the thousands of other satisfied customers that buy and service their vehicles the Napleton way. This 2023 Nissan Altima 2.5 S offered in Gun Metallic will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Splash Guards ($245 value)

  • Includes front and rear splash guards.

Floor Mats and Trunk Mat Package ($355 value)

  • Includes floor mats, trunk mat, hideaway net, and dual trunk hooks.

Safety and Security

  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
  • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.
  • Rear collision mitigation - It has your back. Rear collision mitigation uses sensors to monitor the area behind you. If it senses an impending crash, it activates certain features to help prevent a collision or reduce the severity of it. Put your worries behind you with rear collision mitigation.
  • Brake assist - Stop right there. Something jumps out into the middle of the road and you need to stop now! With brake assist, you will. It uses the speed of the brake pedal's travel to sense panic braking, then applies all available power to boost your stopping power. Brake assist can stop the accident before it is one.

Convenience

  • Unresponsive driver assistant - a reaction to inaction. Maybe you fell asleep. Maybe you lost consciousness. No matter how it happens, Unresponsive driver assistant works to help lessen the danger when it does. It detects prolonged driver unresponsiveness, automatically bringing the vehicle to a stop and turning on the hazard lights. If equipped, emergency services will also be contacted. Unresponsive driver assistant is safety that never sleeps.

Safety and Security

  • Hands-off cruise control - Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety.   • Lane Centering hands-on cruise control with lane change
  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Our staff members are professional in every sense of the word, and receive regular training, including factory certification, so they are truly knowledgeable about the vehicles we offer. We want every customer's experience to be as timely, comfortable and ultimately as satisfying as it possibly can be. You'll see it in every department of every Napleton Auto Group dealership. We hope you'll join the thousands of other satisfied customers that buy and service their vehicles the Napleton way. This 2026 Ford Explorer Platinum offered in Rapid Red Metallic Tinted Clearcoat will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Lux Leather Package ($1,695 value)

  • Premium Leather Seating Surfaces Captain's Chairs
  • Quilting and Stitching on Door Panels
  • Quilting and Stitching on Seats
  • Platinum Badges on Front Row Seats

Equipment Group 600A Standard Package

  • 10-Speed Automatic Transmission
  • 2.3L EcoBoost I-4 Engine
  • GVWR: 5,940 lbs
  • B&O Sound System by Bang & Olufsen with HD Radio

Convenience

  • GPS linked cruise control - Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until GPS linked cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed and the system uses GPS navigation data to maintain that speed without driver intervention - including slowing down for curves and anticipating hills. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Meet your ultimate co-pilot; GPS linked cruise control.
  • Unresponsive driver assistant - a reaction to inaction. Maybe you fell asleep. Maybe you lost consciousness. No matter how it happens, Unresponsive driver assistant works to help lessen the danger when it does. It detects prolonged driver unresponsiveness, automatically bringing the vehicle to a stop and turning on the hazard lights. If equipped, emergency services will also be contacted. Unresponsive driver assistant is safety that never sleeps.

Safety and Security

  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.

Technology and Telematics

  • Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring
  • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.

  • Plaid Cloth Front Bucket Seats

  • 17" Oxford White-Painted Aluminum Wheels

Safety and Security

  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
  • Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-on cruise control.

Technology and Telematics

  • Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring
  • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.

We hope you'll join the thousands of other satisfied customers that buy and service their vehicles the Napleton way. This 2026 Ford F-150 Lobo offered in Agate Black will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

F-150 Lobo Package ($4,695 value)

  • Two-Speed Automatic 4WD with Neutral Towing Capability
  • Lower Body Ground Effects
  • Painted Grille
  • Signature Lighting
  • 22" Aluminum Wheels
  • Dual Exhaust with Black Tips
  • Electronic Locking with 3.73 Axle Ratio

Equipment Group 200A Mid

  • 12" Cluster Display
  • Electronic 10-Speed Automatic Transmission
  • Unique Sport Cloth 40/console/40 Front-Seats
  • LED Fog Lamps with LED Cornering Lamp
  • 275/60R20 All-Terrain Tires
  • 20" Dark Gray Aluminum Wheels
  • 6,650 lbs Payload Package GVWR
  • AM/FM Stereo with SiriusXM 360L

Safety and Security

  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
  • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.
  • Rear collision mitigation - It has your back. Rear collision mitigation uses sensors to monitor the area behind you. If it senses an impending crash, it activates certain features to help prevent a collision or reduce the severity of it. Put your worries behind you with rear collision mitigation.

Technology and Telematics

  • SYNC 4 AppLink/Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring
  • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.
Other notable features: ENGINE: 5.0L V8, AGATE BLACK METALLIC, BLACK, UNIQUE SPORT CLOTH 40/CONSOLE/40 FRONT-SEATS Napleton Columbus Ford is proud to serve customers in communities that include Milwaukee, Madison, Green Bay, Kenosha, Racine, Appleton, Waukesha, Oshkosh, Eau Claire, Janesville, West Allis, La Crosse, Sheboygan, Wauwatosa, Fond du Lac, New Berlin, Brookfield, Wausau, Beloit, Greenfield, Manitowoc, Franklin, Oak Creek, West Bend, Sun Prairie, Superior, Stevens Point, Neenah, De Pere, Mequon and Chicagoland area. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
      • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.

      Technology and Telematics

      • Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring
      • SYNC 4 AppLink/Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring
      • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.

Convenience

  • GPS linked cruise control - Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until GPS linked cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed and the system uses GPS navigation data to maintain that speed without driver intervention - including slowing down for curves and anticipating hills. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Meet your ultimate co-pilot; GPS linked cruise control.

Safety and Security

  • Hands-off cruise control - Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now with hands-off cruise control simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles with minimal steering input from you. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-off cruise control.

It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.

Technology and Telematics

Convenience

  • GPS linked cruise control - Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until GPS linked cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed and the system uses GPS navigation data to maintain that speed without driver intervention - including slowing down for curves and anticipating hills. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Meet your ultimate co-pilot; GPS linked cruise control.

Safety and Security

  • Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-on cruise control.

Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.

Convenience

  • GPS linked cruise control - Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until GPS linked cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed and the system uses GPS navigation data to maintain that speed without driver intervention - including slowing down for curves and anticipating hills. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Meet your ultimate co-pilot; GPS linked cruise control.
  • Unresponsive driver assistant - a reaction to inaction. Maybe you fell asleep. Maybe you lost consciousness. No matter how it happens, Unresponsive driver assistant works to help lessen the danger when it does. It detects prolonged driver unresponsiveness, automatically bringing the vehicle to a stop and turning on the hazard lights. If equipped, emergency services will also be contacted. Safety and Security

This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Resting your right foot is right at your fingertips thanks to cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls.

Safety and Security

  • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.
  • Brake assist - Stop right there. Something jumps out into the middle of the road and you need to stop now! With brake assist, you will. It uses the speed of the brake pedal's travel to sense panic braking, then applies all available power to boost your stopping power. Brake assist can stop the accident before it is one.

Technology and Telematics

  • Selective Internet access - a more focused delivery. Selective internet access allows you to tailor the features for your feed, such as sports scores, local news, or current weather. When it comes to getting what you want, selective internet access is a net gain.
Other notable features: ENGINE: 1.6L ECOBOOST Napleton Columbus Ford is proud to serve customers in communities that include Milwaukee, Madison, Green Bay, Kenosha, Racine, Appleton, Waukesha, Oshkosh, Eau Claire, Janesville, West Allis, La Crosse, Sheboygan, Wauwatosa, Fond du Lac, New Berlin, Brookfield, Wausau, Beloit, Greenfield, Manitowoc, Franklin, Oak Creek, West Bend, Sun Prairie, Superior, Stevens Point, Neenah, De Pere, Mequon and Chicagoland area. entry.title: 2026 Ford Maverick LARIAT
entry.ns0:description:
The Napleton Auto Group promotes a no pressure buying experience that puts the customer in charge of the buying process, and for over 80 years, the Napleton family has made sure that absolutely nothing is more important than our commitment to your satisfaction. Our staff members are professional in every sense of the word, and receive regular training, including factory certification, so they are truly knowledgeable about the vehicles we offer. We want every customer's experience to be as timely, comfortable and ultimately as satisfying as it possibly can be. You'll see it in every department of every Napleton Auto Group dealership. We hope you'll join the thousands of other satisfied customers that buy and service their vehicles the Napleton way. This 2026 Ford Maverick LARIAT offered in Azure Gray Metallic Tri-Coat will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Convenience

  • GPS linked cruise control - Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until GPS linked cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed and the system uses GPS navigation data to maintain that speed without driver intervention - including slowing down for curves and anticipating hills. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Meet your ultimate co-pilot; GPS linked cruise control.

Safety and Security

  • Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-on cruise control.
  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.

Technology and Telematics

  • Smart device mirroring - Smartphone, meet smart car. You can control your device through your vehicle's infotainment system. Smart device mirroring brings together safety and convenience by making it easier to find what you're looking for while keeping your eyes on the road.
  • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.

Convenience

  • Cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed using the steering wheel mounted controls and it will maintain that speed without driver intervention. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Resting your right foot is right at your fingertips thanks to cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls.

Safety and Security

  • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.
  • Brake assist - Stop right there. Something jumps out into the middle of the road and you need to stop now! With brake assist, you will. It uses the speed of the brake pedal's travel to sense panic braking, then applies all available power to boost your stopping power. Brake assist can stop the accident before it is one.

Technology and Telematics

  • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.
  • Integrated navigation system - A to B made easy! Whether it's an errand or a road trip, an integrated navigation system will guide you to your destination. No more bulky, impossible-to-fold maps, and no more stopping to ask for directions. With integrated navigation system you always know the right way.
